security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost blob: data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' https://app.posthog.com https://*.posthog.com https://*.i.posthog.com https://*.assets.i.posthog.com; connect-src 'self' ipc: https://ipc.localhost https://app.posthog.com https://*.posthog.com https://*.i.posthog.com
